prompt: Outfit: a feminine white summer Y2K outfit featuring a fitted white eyelet lace bustier-style mini dress with a soft sweetheart neckline, delicate all-over cutwork embroidery, lightly structured bodice shaping, side ruched drawstring details, small ribbon-tie accents, and a softly flared mini skirt hem, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable lightweight cotton lace weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, and detailed garment realism; paired with white knee-high lace socks with subtle floral openwork texture and black chunky platform loafer-style shoes with leather-like material, clean stitching, metal-free minimal finishing, layered rubber sole construction, and realistic footwear materials; finished with a small ivory-to-cream rounded mini shoulder bag with a simple short strap and clean leather-like body; add a random mix of delicate feminine accessories in pearl-tone, silver-tone, or soft romantic Y2K style that naturally match the outfit; not costume-like, not cheap-looking.
promptEn: Outfit: a feminine white summer Y2K outfit featuring a fitted white eyelet lace bustier-style mini dress with a soft sweetheart neckline, delicate all-over cutwork embroidery, lightly structured bodice shaping, side ruched drawstring details, small ribbon-tie accents, and a softly flared mini skirt hem, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable lightweight cotton lace weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, and detailed garment realism; paired with white knee-high lace socks with subtle floral openwork texture and black chunky platform loafer-style shoes with leather-like material, clean stitching, metal-free minimal finishing, layered rubber sole construction, and realistic footwear materials; finished with a small ivory-to-cream rounded mini shoulder bag with a simple short strap and clean leather-like body; add a random mix of delicate feminine accessories in pearl-tone, silver-tone, or soft romantic Y2K style that naturally match the outfit; not costume-like, not cheap-looking.
promptZh: 穿搭：一套甜美的 白色 夏季 Y2K 风格穿搭，包含一件修身白色镂空蕾丝胸衣式迷你裙，配有柔和的心形领口、精致的通体镂空刺绣、轻盈的胸衣塑形设计、侧边褶皱抽绳细节、小巧的丝带系带装饰以及微微外扩的迷你裙摆；具备高级的面料质感、逼真的服装结构、整洁的缝线、自然的接缝张力、可信的轻薄棉质蕾丝重量、细微的褶皱、真实的垂坠感、精致的边缘处理、可见的接缝、真实的折痕、做工精良的服装细节、高品质的材质触感以及细腻的服装真实感；搭配白色及膝蕾丝袜，带有细微的花卉镂空纹理；脚穿黑色厚底乐福鞋，采用仿皮材质、整洁的缝线、无金属简约饰面、层叠橡胶鞋底结构以及逼真的鞋履材质；配有一个象牙白至奶油色的小巧圆润迷你单肩包，带有简约短肩带和干净的仿皮包身；添加一些珍珠色、银色或柔和浪漫 Y2K 风格的精致女性化配饰，与整体穿搭自然融合；拒绝廉价感，拒绝演出服既视感。
